regions: Africa, Middle East and South Asia
Asia Pacific, Australia and New Zealand and China Region

segments: Africa, Middle East and South Asia (AMESA)
Asia Pacific, Australia and New Zealand and China Region (APAC)

dependencies: Principal ingredients include acesulfame potassium, aspartame, corn, corn sweeteners, flavorings, flour, juice concentrates, nuts, oats, potatoes, raw milk, rice, seasonings, sucralose, sugar, vegetable and essential oils, and wheat
Key packaging materials include plastic resins (PET and polypropylene), aluminum, glass, closures, cardboard and paperboard cartons
Fuel, electricity and natural gas are important commodities
Many ingredients and raw materials purchased in open market subject to price fluctuation
Some raw materials and supplies available only from limited number of suppliers or sole supplier
Risk mitigated through purchases from multiple geographies and suppliers
risks: Commodity price volatility and fluctuations in availability
Supply chain disruptions from weather conditions, natural disasters, disease or pests, health epidemics or pandemics
Labor shortages or changes in workforce availability
Strikes or work stoppages by railway workers or third parties
Loss or impairment of key manufacturing sites
Political uncertainties, geopolitical events and tensions, wars and military conflicts (Ukraine, Middle East)
New, expanded or retaliatory tariffs, sanctions, quotas or trade barriers
Inflation and higher operating costs including transportation and labor
Climate change impacts on agricultural production and raw material availability

regulatory_risks: Federal Food, Drug and Cosmetic Act and state laws governing food safety and labeling
Food Safety Modernization Act
Occupational Safety and Health Act and state workplace health and safety laws
Environmental protection laws (Clean Air Act, Clean Water Act, CERCLA, RCRA)
Federal Motor Carrier Safety Act
Federal Trade Commission Act and Lanham Act (advertising)
Robinson-Patman Act and Clayton Act (competition and trade practices)
Equal Employment Opportunity Act, National Labor Relations Act, Fair Labor Standards Act
Data privacy laws including California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) and California Privacy Rights Act
Foreign Corrupt Practices Act and UK Bribery Act
Trade Sanctions Reform and Export Enhancement Act
California Proposition 65 (product warnings)
European Union General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
UK Modern Slavery Act (supply chain)
Food (Promotion and Placement)(England) Regulations
New or increased taxes on manufacture, distribution or sale of products based on ingredients (sugar, sodium, saturated fat)
Taxes on beverages with caloric sweeteners or added sugar
Extended producer responsibility policies and packaging regulations
Minimum recycled content requirements for packaging
Restrictions or bans on single-use plastics and PFAS in packaging
Deposit return systems for beverage containers
Product labeling and warning requirements
Restrictions on marketing or sale in schools
Age restrictions on product marketing
Bans on advertising during children's TV programs
Color-coded labeling requirements (red, yellow, green for ingredients)
Restrictions on 'ultra-processed' foods
Climate change and greenhouse gas emissions regulations
Mandatory ESG reporting requirements including Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive (EU)
OECD global minimum tax rate of 15%
Artificial intelligence and machine learning regulations
Import/export restrictions and tariffs including recent US tariffs on China, Canada, Mexico

sanction_risks: Trade Sanctions Reform and Export Enhancement Act compliance
New, expanded or retaliatory tariffs including recent US tariffs on China, Canada and Mexico
Sanctions and export controls on certain countries
Foreign ownership restrictions in certain markets
Nationalization or expropriation of assets risk
Currency controls and restrictions on fund transfers
Government-mandated closure or threatened closure of operations
